module.name: grid
module.description: A responsive grid of equal-sized content cards; one card per body section.
module.aiSpec:
Lay out several equal-sized content cards in a responsive grid — feature tiles, comparison points, a set of parallel notes. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one section per card. Each section is ordinary Markdown (e.g. a bold heading line then body text). The grid collapses to a single column on narrow screens. For an icon-led list use @iconlist instead; for status columns use @kanban.
Parameters: - `columns`: number of columns (1-6, default 3). - `gap`: CSS length between cards (default 1rem). - `cardstyle` (card|plain|outline, default card): card = filled panel with border and shadow; outline = border only, no shadow; plain = no box (bare content). - `align` (left|center|right, default left): text alignment inside the cards. - `padding`: CSS padding inside each card (default 14px 16px). - `radius`: CSS corner radius of the cards (default var(--radius-sm)).
Example: <!-- @grid columns: 3, cardstyle: outline, align: center --> **Fast** Sub-second builds. <!-- @ --> **Secure** Local, token auth. <!-- @ --> **Offline** No CDN required. <!-- @end -->

param.name: columns
param.label: Columns
param.desc: Number of columns in the card grid.

param.name: gap
param.label: Gap
param.desc: CSS length between cards, e.g. 1rem or 16px.

param.name: cardstyle
param.label: Card style
param.desc: card = filled panel; outline = border only; plain = no box.

param.name: padding
param.label: Card padding
param.desc: CSS padding inside each card, e.g. 14px 16px.

param.name: radius
param.label: Corner radius
param.desc: CSS corner radius of the cards; blank = theme default.

snippet.label: Grid (3 cards)
snippet.text: <!-- @grid columns: 3 --> **First** Content of the first card. <!-- @ --> **Second** Content of the second card. <!-- @ --> **Third** Content of the third card. <!-- @end -->
